problem id: a9b2349f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) AND SHL(2)

examples:
  00011001 -> 01000100
  11100000 -> 00000000
  00011111 -> 01000100
  11010111 -> 01010100
  11000000 -> 00000000
  00100011 -> 10001000
  01001010 -> 00000000
  01001000 -> 00000000
  01111010 -> 10001000
  11101100 -> 00110000

query: 00010100
predicted answer: 00000000
